citations.section: Annex A current coefficient figures A9/A10/A11

citations.section: Rudder force and yaw-moment workbook inputs

ocimf_basis_selection.limitation: B1528 SIROCCO is not an OCIMF tanker-class vessel; loaded-tanker curves are used off-class as a generic/reference screening basis only.
